onboarding.slide1_desc: Find your next culinary adventure from our curated selection of gourmet recipes and secret chef preparations.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Follow clean, step-by-step instructions designed to scale beautifully on both phones and tablets.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Publish your own custom recipes, build your digital cookbook, and share the joy of food with others.

auth.join_cooknook: Join CookNook to build your personal cookbook
auth.reset_password_desc: An email password reset link will be sent in the future.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.reset_email_sent_desc: A password reset link has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

errors.invalid_credential: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
errors.wrong_password: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
errors.user_not_found: No account was found matching this email address.
errors.email_already_in_use: This email address is already in use by another account. Please sign in instead.
errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.weak_password: Your password must be stronger. Please enter at least 6 characters.
errors.network_request_failed: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.too_many_requests: Too many failed login attempts. Access has been temporarily blocked. Please try again later.
errors.user_disabled: This user account has been disabled. Please contact support.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before logging in. We have sent another verification email to {{email}}.

home.no_recipes_category: No recipes found in this category

explore.no_results_desc: We couldn't find any recipes matching "{{query}}" in category "{{category}}"

create.desc_placeholder: Tell us about your culinary creation...
create.instruction_placeholder: e.g. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat.
create.error_missing_fields: Please fill in all core fields.
create.error_no_ingredients: Please add at least one ingredient.
create.error_no_instructions: Please add at least one instruction step.
create.success_message: Your delicious recipe has been shared!

favorites.no_favorites_desc: Tap the heart icon on any recipe to save it here for quick access later!

profile.title: Chef Profile
profile.image_source_desc: Select how you want to add your profile photo.
profile.camera_permission_desc: We need camera permissions to snap a profile photo.
profile.gallery_permission_desc: We need photo library permissions to select a profile photo.
profile.error_name_required: Chef Name is a mandatory field.
profile.error_mobile_required: Mobile number is a mandatory field.
profile.upload_prompt: Tap the camera to update photo
profile.bio_placeholder: Write a short story about your culinary journey...
